import sys
input = sys.stdin.readline

t = int(input())
for _ in range(t):
    n = int(input())
    a = list(map(int, input().split()))
    b = list(map(int, input().split()))
    res = []
    for i in range(n):
        dominators = [(j) for j in range(n) if a[j] > a[i] and b[j] > b[i]]
        if not dominators:
            res.append('1')
        else:
            can_win = True
            for j in dominators:
                found = any((a[k] > a[j] or b[k] > b[j]) and (a[i] > a[k] or b[i] > b[k]) for k in range(n) if k != i and k != j)
                if not found:
                    can_win = False
                    break
            res.append('1' if can_win else '0')
    print(''.join(res))

t = int(input())

    max_b = max(b)

        # i can win iff for ALL j: a[i]>a[j] or b[i]>b[j]
        # which means: no j has both a[j]>a[i] and b[j]>b[i]
        can_win = a[i] == max_a or b[i] == max_b
        result.append('1' if can_win else '0')
    
    print(''.join(result))

input = sys.stdin.readline

t = int(input())
for _ in range(t):
    n = int(input())
    a = list(map(int, input().split()))
    b = list(map(int, input().split()))
    res = []
    for i in range(n):
        dominators = [(j) for j in range(n) if a[j] > a[i] and b[j] > b[i]]
        if not dominators:
            res.append('1')
        else:
            can_win = True
            for j in dominators:
                found = any((a[k] > a[j] or b[k] > b[j]) and (a[i] > a[k] or b[i] > b[k]) for k in range(n) if k != i and k != j)
                if not found:
                    can_win = False
                    break
            res.append('1' if can_win else '0')
    print(''.join(res))

        for j in range(n):
            if i != j:
                if a[i] < a[j] and b[i] < b[j]:
                    can_win = False
                    break
        res.append('1' if can_win else '0')

    b = list(map(int, input().split()))
    
    max_a = max(a)
    max_b = max(b)
    
    # index of player with max_a
    idx_max_a = a.index(max_a)
    idx_max_b = b.index(max_b)
    
    b_of_max_a = b[idx_max_a]
    a_of_max_b = a[idx_max_b]
    
    result = []
    for i in range(n):
        if a[i] == max_a or b[i] == max_b or b[i] > b_of_max_a or a[i] > a_of_max_b:
            result.append('1')
        else:
            result.append('0')
    
    print(''.join(result))

import sys
input = sys.stdin.readline

t = int(input())
for _ in range(t):
    n = int(input())
    a = list(map(int, input().split()))
    b = list(map(int, input().split()))
    
    max_a = max(a)
    max_b = max(b)
    
    result = []
    for i in range(n):
        # Player i can win if for every j, a[i]>a[j] or b[i]>b[j]
        # Equivalently, no player j dominates i on both maps
        # j dominates i if a[j]>a[i] and b[j]>b[i]
        # Player i can win iff no such j exists... wait that's not right either
        # Actually: player i can beat j iff a[i]>a[j] or b[i]>b[j]
        # i can win iff for ALL j: a[i]>a[j] or b[i]>b[j]
        # which means: no j has both a[j]>a[i] and b[j]>b[i]
        can_win = a[i] == max_a or b[i] == max_b
        result.append('1' if can_win else '0')
    
    print(''.join(result))
